summary: The patient has recorded conditions including Acute viral pharyngitis (disorder), Polyp of colon, Viral sinusitis (disorder), Stroke, Streptococcal sore throat (disorder), Viral sinusitis (disorder), Hypertension, and Body mass index 30+ - obesity (finding). Medications listed are Hydrochlorothiazide 25 MG and Penicillin V Potassium 500 MG Oral Tablet. Estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) measurements between 2013 and 2020 show variability, including a lower value of 66.23027040212287 mL/min/{1.73_m2} on 2015-04-09 and higher values above 120 mL/min/{1.73_m2} on multiple other dates. Hemoglobin values are similar across available dates (approximately 13.0 g/dL) and BMI values are consistently recorded near 27.5 kg/m2 across multiple visits; an oral temperature of 38.422173476781495 C was recorded on 2016-11-06 and several blood pressure entries are recorded as Unknown. Multiple ambulatory encounters are documented from 1968 through 2020, with the most recent listed on 2020-05-07.
